name: Boost Score Now
description_short: Boost Score Now offers credit repair, tradeline purchasing (authorized user piggybacking), and hard inquiry removal from an Oceanside, CA office.
description_long:
Boost Score Now is a credit repair and tradeline services company based in Oceanside, California, founded by Devin M. Davis, a US Marine veteran and self-described finance expert. The company operates from Suite 106 at 1930 South Coast Highway and markets itself as offering "the fastest credit repair in the industry." Davis positions himself as an entrepreneur with experience in financial services and business coaching, claiming years of study in finance, credit, and business matters.

The company's primary service offerings include: (1) aggressive credit repair that targets negative items on credit reports over a 90-day period, (2) purchase of seasoned authorized user tradelines with perfect payment history and low utilization (under 30%) to boost credit scores through piggybacking, (3) hard inquiry removal services, and (4) free credit report analysis. They also offer a free e-book titled "Secret Lenders List" that claims to reveal which credit bureaus specific credit card companies and banks pull from. Contact is available via phone (760-224-6900), text (CREDIT to the same number), or email (devin@boostscorenow.com).

What distinguishes Boost Score Now is their emphasis on tradeline purchasing—a controversial practice of adding consumers as authorized users on established credit accounts to artificially boost scores—combined with aggressive dispute-based credit repair. They claim to have "deleted over 1000's of negative items" and emphasize speed of service. The company operates extended hours (9am-5pm) and offers direct contact with the owner.

The company includes a legal disclaimer that they "do not guarantee certain score by law," which is important given the nature of credit repair claims. The website content focuses heavily on marketing promises rather than detailed service explanations, transparent pricing, or client testimonials. Tradeline purchasing remains a legally gray and ethically debated practice; while adding authorized users is technically legal, purchasing tradelines specifically for credit boost purposes is scrutinized by regulators.
address: Seacrest Office Building Suite, 1930 S Coast Hwy #106, Oceanside, CA 92054

company_info.headquarters: Seacrest Office Building Suite, 1930 S Coast Hwy #106, Oceanside, CA 92054

pros: Offers free credit report analysis and consultation
Claims rapid service delivery with 90-day aggressive dispute cycles
Provides seasoned authorized user tradelines with documented perfect payment history and low utilization
Direct owner contact available (Devin M. Davis) rather than call center
Multiple contact methods: phone, text, and email
Offers free e-book resource on credit bureau inquiry practices
cons: Tradeline purchasing is ethically controversial and legally scrutinized as artificial score manipulation
No transparent pricing information available on website; requires contacting company for quotes
Vague service descriptions without specific case outcomes, success rates, or client testimonials
Makes aggressive claims ('fastest in industry,' deleted '1000s of items') without third-party verification or FTC substantiation
Legal disclaimer that results are not guaranteed contradicts prominent marketing language suggesting rapid guaranteed improvements
best_for: Consumers with legitimate errors or unauthorized accounts on credit reports seeking aggressive dispute representation
Borrowers with sufficient income to afford tradeline purchases who want quick credit score boosts before major purchases
Those willing to accept the legal and ethical ambiguities of authorized user tradeline strategies
diagnosis: Boost Score Now is best for consumers with genuine credit report errors who need aggressive dispute representation, and for those with adequate means to purchase tradelines willing to accept the controversial nature of authorized user piggybacking strategies. The main caveat is that tradeline purchasing—their signature offering—remains legally contested and ethically debated, with no guarantee of results despite marketing claims of industry-leading speed and success.
services: Credit repair and negative item disputation (90-day aggressive cycles)
Seasoned authorized user tradeline purchase and setup
Free credit report review and analysis
Credit coaching and personalized guidance during repair process
Tradeline packages with varying account ages and utilization rates
Free 'Secret Lenders List' e-book on credit bureau inquiry practices
